message:
feat(engine): integrate adaptive router, optimal stopping, and tropical scheduler into orchestrator

Wire RegretBoundedRouter (EXP3/FTRL) and EscalationPolicy (CUSUM
change-point detection) into ExecutionOrchestrator for adaptive lane
selection and runtime halt decisions. Integrate tropical-semiring
InstructionCostGraph into the IR3 lowering path for critical-path
scheduling.

regret_bounded_router: switch counterfactual tracking from per-round
best-arm to per-arm cumulative vectors, enabling exact best-fixed-arm
regret computation. Add CounterfactualSizeMismatch error variant.

tropical_semiring: fix critical-path source traceback via argmax
predecessor chain instead of scanning for zero-start sources. Add
position-index consistency validation. Remove redundant tropical-min
pass in ScheduleOptimizer, keep topological order to respect zero-cost
dependency edges.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
